title: Neomammillaria boedekeriana
taxonomy: Neomammillaria boedekeriana is a species of flowering plant in the cactus family, Cactaceae. It is native to Mexico and is a type of mammillaria cactus. Mammillaria is a genus of cacti that are commonly known as pincushion cacti. The genus Mammillaria is divided into several subgenera and species based on their physical characteristics. Neomammillaria is a subgenus within the Mammillaria genus.

The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its various health benefits, including its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which can help to alleviate symptoms of colds, fever, and respiratory issues.
